summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures tight by 2.12%. the main contract I2401 closed 862, some traders were active to sell,steel mills purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
